content: When inserting multiple new phases, plan the `after` chain to match desired *display* order, not just logical position. `phase_create` accepts `after` and `atStart` but there's no `phase_update` to move a phase later. If you insert `pharmacy` after `intake-flow` but the architecture plan actually wants `pharmacy` after `mdi`, you can't fix it without recreating phases.
context: Discovered while turning the Apoth architecture plan into storybloq tickets (2026-05-19). The 5 new phases (infrastructure, kyc, mdi-integration, pharmacy, hardening) were inserted relative to existing phases, but the existing intake-flow / payments order placed Intake before Payments — so Pharmacy (inserted after intake-flow) landed before Payments / KYC / MDI in the display, even though execution order should be Payments → KYC → MDI → Intake → Pharmacy. No storybloq tool exists to fix this after the fact.
title: Storybloq has no phase reorder — sequence inserts on first pass
